abilities.name: Beggar-Merchant Persona
abilities.description: The Spring Ghosts can adopt a disguise that allows them to move through markets and settlements without attracting undue attention.

abilities.name: Subterranean Navigation
abilities.description: The Spring Ghosts possess a deep understanding of the subterranean highway, allowing them to navigate it with ease.

abilities.name: Haunting Displays
abilities.description: The Spring Ghosts can create unsettling displays to deter intruders and maintain their secrecy.

vulnerabilities.name: Data Analysis
vulnerabilities.description: The Spring Ghosts' existence is threatened by modern, data-driven intelligence.
